title: Klarna and Wix expand global partnership into Canada, bringing flexible payment options to e-commerce businesses of all sizes
full_text:
Wix merchants in Canada can now offer their customers Klarna’s alternative payment options at checkout 

Toronto, ON – September 29, 2022 — Klarna, the global leader in the generational shift away from credit cards, today announced its expanded partnership with Wix (Nasdaq: WIX), a leading global SaaS platform to create, manage and grow an online presence. Together, Wix and Klarna will bring fair and flexible payment options to Wix eCommerce merchants across Canada.

“Consumers today are increasingly mindful of how they are spending, and are seeking alternatives to traditional interest-bearing credit options. Over 150 million consumers worldwide choose Klarna because it’s a fairer and more sustainable way to pay, providing them with greater flexibility and control,” said Kristina Elkhazin, Head of North America, Klarna. “We’re thrilled to continue our successful partnership with Wix to enable more Canadian retailers to offer this superior shopping and payments experience to their consumers.”

Market demand for alternative payment options is growing fast, with at least half of Canadians aged between 25 and 56 looking for flexible payment options like Klarna at checkout, according to Klarna research. 

Through this partnership, Wix merchants in Canada can now easily offer Klarna's suite of flexible payment options, including its popular “Pay in 4” solution, while increasing average order value, conversion and tapping into Klarna’s growing ecosystem of 150 million global customers and app users.

“Wix is always looking to expand partnerships to new geographies and continue bringing more value to our merchants across the globe,” said Amit Sagiv and Volodymyr Tsukur, Co-Heads of Wix Payments. “Together with Klarna we are happy to continue to provide Wix merchants with more payment options to increase conversions and their overall cart value, and supply current and new customers with more payment options.”

This expansion follows the success of the Wix and Klarna global partnership launched in 2021. In addition to Canada, Wix offers Klarna to e-commerce merchants across markets including the US, UK, AUS, NZ, DE, IE, PT, CZ, AT, CH, SE, NO, FI, DK, BE, NL, FRA, ES, PL, GR and IT.

About Klarna

Klarna is a global digital bank and flexible payments provider. With over 114 million global active Klarna users and 3.4 million transactions per day, Klarna’s AI-powered payments and commerce network is empowering people to pay smarter with a mission to be available everywhere for everything. Consumers can pay with Klarna online, in-store and through Apple Pay & Google Pay. More than 850,000 retailers trust Klarna’s innovative solutions to drive growth and loyalty, including Uber, H&M, Saks, Sephora, Macy's, Ikea, Expedia Group, Nike and Airbnb.

About Wix.com Ltd.

Wix is a leading platform to create, manage and grow a digital presence. What began as a website builder in 2006 is now a complete platform providing users with enterprise-grade performance, security and a reliable infrastructure. Offering a wide range of commerce and business solutions, advanced SEO and marketing tools, Wix enables users to have full ownership of their brand, their data and their relationships with their customers. With a focus on continuous innovation and delivery of new features and products, anyone can build a powerful digital presence to fulfill their dreams on Wix.
